curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff of PR forkcms/library#69. Only one source file was modified: spoon/cookie/cookie.php. The get() function contained an unsafe @unserialize() call on user-controlled cookie values, and the set() function used serialize() to store cookie values. The patch replaced both with json_decode/json_encode and added validation to reject serialized objects. The advisory also directly references the vulnerable line in spoon/library at commit bda89be, confirming the location.
